TownBuilding_Blacksmith._unlockedBuildingDesc: In the {GlobalKeywords.Blacksmith} you can modify {:color(Building):{GlobalKeywords.Cards}} and {:color(Building):{GlobalKeywords.Gems}}.
TownBuilding_Blacksmith._lockedBuildingDesc: There's {:color(red): nothing} to see here right now except flint and steel.

TownBuilding_Fortune._unlockedBuildingDesc: Step right up for all things {:color(Building):{GlobalKeywords.Arcana}} related.
TownBuilding_Fortune._lockedBuildingDesc: An empty pitching site. Perhaps there will be something here soon.

TownBuilding_Graveyard._unlockedBuildingDesc: A Graveyard seems the most appropriate place for a {:color(Building):{GlobalKeywords.Settings}} menu.
TownBuilding_Graveyard._lockedBuildingDesc: The graveyard is closed right now. Come back later.

TownBuilding_Inn._unlockedBuildingDesc: The Gorton Bell Inn. Relax with a pint of milk and ask mighty {:color(Building):{GlobalKeywords.Crawlers}} to join your party.
TownBuilding_Inn._lockedBuildingDesc: The Inn seems closed for now. Perhaps there's nobody in.

TownBuilding_Museum._unlockedBuildingDesc: The {GlobalKeywords.Museum} of antiquities. Here you can peruse a collection of {:color(Building):{GlobalKeywords.Relics}}.
TownBuilding_Museum._lockedBuildingDesc: The Museum has nothing to display yet. Come back when you find something.

TownBuilding_Shop._unlockedBuildingDesc: Purchase {:color(Building):{GlobalKeywords.PowerUps}} to boost your stats.  Got some rare things on sale, stranger!
TownBuilding_Shop._lockedBuildingDesc: The shop is closed to unworthy adventurers. Come back when you've proved your worth.

TownBuilding_TownHall._lockedBuildingDesc: The Town Hall is only accessible to adventurers who achievements are worth noting.

TownBuilding_WorldMap._unlockedBuildingDesc: Venture forth with your party and {GlobalKeywords.Arcana}. Adventure awaits!
TownBuilding_WorldMap._lockedBuildingDesc: This Building is unavailable. Come back later.
